title: crotalaria iringana
intro: Crotalaria iringana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, contributing to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Crotalaria iringana can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to have therapeutic effects in treating various ailments.
